libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No required environment or system properties. For core-only coverage, prefer built-in paths such as MapPropertySource, SystemPropertiesPropertySource, EnvironmentVariablesPropertySource, or .props/.properties resources. Do not use YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON resource files unless the test intentionally adds the corresponding non-core Hoplite parser module.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation states YAML, JSON, TOML, and HOCON require separate hoplite-yaml, hoplite-json, hoplite-toml, or hoplite-hocon modules; generated tests that pick those formats without adding a module will fail for reasons unrelated to hoplite-core.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 has only Kotlin/coroutines runtime dependencies and ships core config loading/decoding APIs plus the built-in Java properties parser; no Docker image, extra Maven dependency, environment variable, or system property is required before meaningful core coverage is reachable.
